tools.name: projects.remotebuildexecutionProjectsInstancesCreate
tools.description: Creates a new instance in the specified region. Returns a long running operation which contains an instance on completion. While the long running operation is in progress, any call to `GetInstance` returns an instance in state `CREATING`.

tools.name: projects.remotebuildexecutionProjectsInstancesTestNotify
tools.description: Sends a test notification to the specified instance. Returns a `google.protobuf.Empty` on success.

tools.name: projects.remotebuildexecutionProjectsInstancesWorkerpoolsCreate
tools.description: Creates a new worker pool with a specified size and configuration. Returns a long running operation which contains a worker pool on completion. While the long running operation is in progress, any call to `GetWorkerPool` returns a worker pool in state `CREATING`.

tools.name: projects.remotebuildexecutionProjectsInstancesWorkerpoolsDelete
tools.description: Deletes the specified worker pool. Returns a long running operation, which contains a `google.protobuf.Empty` response on completion. While the long running operation is in progress, any call to `GetWorkerPool` returns a worker pool in state `DELETING`.

tools.name: projects.remotebuildexecutionProjectsInstancesWorkerpoolsList
tools.description: Lists worker pools in an instance.

tools.name: projects.remotebuildexecutionProjectsInstancesWorkerpoolsPatch
tools.description: Updates an existing worker pool with a specified size and/or configuration. Returns a long running operation, which contains a worker pool on completion. While the long running operation is in progress, any call to `GetWorkerPool` returns a worker pool in state `UPDATING`.

tools.name: projects.remotebuildexecutionProjectsOperationsGet
tools.description: Gets the latest state of a long-running operation. Clients can use this method to poll the operation result at intervals as recommended by the API service.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
